heading: Withdrawal of books from Library of Congress
label: 137c Withdrawal of books from Library of Congress
text: The chief judge and associate judges of the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia and the chief judge and associate judges of the United States District Court for the District of Columbia are authorized to use and take books from the Library of Congress in the same manner and subject to the same regulations as justices of the Supreme Court of the United States.
notes: Change of NameAct , eff. , as amended by act , substituted “United States District Court for the District of Columbia” for “District Court of the United States for the District of Columbia”, “chief judge” for “chief justice” and “associate judges” for “associate justices” wherever appearing.June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948May 24, 1949Act , substituted “District Court of the United States for the said District” for “Supreme Court for the said District”.June 25, 1936Act , substituted “United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia” for “Court of Appeals of the District of Columbia”.June 7, 1934
